microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's enterprise recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across SIA-caliber accounts including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and shifted execution to a scalable, consultant-free model.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract—navigating complex stakeholder dynamics across engineering, legal, and C-suite audiences.

Built an **AI-driven planning agent** and restructured drill workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%, demonstrating a bias toward building tools independently when gaps existed.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience testing capability in **4 months**, achieving a 94% recovery rate and surfacing critical hardware defects—delivering a data-driven narrative that reshaped executive product strategy.
microsoft_2023: Championed **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key enterprise teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Influenced the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ discovery interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating customer narratives into a prioritized, consultant-backed roadmap.

Improved **data-driven storytelling** infrastructure by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting stakeholder lookup time by 83%.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams—acting as a strategic force multiplier for a complex, multi-stakeholder selling motion.

Conducted discovery with **20+ enterprise service teams** to surface 81 hours of manual effort per region launch, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths—translating ambiguous operational data into a clear, executive-ready business case.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments with a data-driven, consultative framework.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations—demonstrating resilience and ownership in a high-stakes, ambiguous enterprise environment.

Drove **strategic alignment** across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable execution model for future rollouts.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and prioritized the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, pushing teams to operate with intention around sprint goals and next steps rather than allowing reactive, unstructured execution.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing for 200+ monthly proposals via a new CRM process, building a consultative sales motion grounded in account-level data and structured follow-through.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy—mirroring the data-driven, performance-narrative approach central to enterprise client engagement.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify and close margin leaks, delivering a clear business-impact narrative to senior stakeholders.
